titleStmt.title: SII 17.576: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 576. (A.R. No. 531 of 1904.) TIRUTTEṄGŪR, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the central shrine in the Rajatagirīśvara temple.
The details of date given viz., 11+1 year, Kaṟkaṭaka ba, Monday, Rōhiṇī, cor responds to 1257 A.D., July 9, Monday. The tithi was 11.

This epigraph seems to state that the temple authorities exempted the merchant of Tirutteṅgūr, a tiruṉundāviḷakkuppuṟam in the dēvadāṉa of god Tiruveḷḷiyaṅguṉṟamuḍaiya nāyaṉār, from the payment of the tax in oil in consideration of the return of the land bought from the temple, by them sometime back in lieu of 50 kāśu received by them. They also arranged to give to Tirutteṅgūr Pōyaṉ some other land as vēṭṭai-ppēṟu in return for the land which was included in the tirunundāviḷakku-ppuṟam.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
—svastiśrī ..tribhuvanaccakravarttikaḷ śrīrājendracoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 1 vatiṉ Etirā māṇṭu kaṟkaṭaka nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu ti
ṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum Urocaṇiyum peṟṟa nāḷ muṉṉāḷil Uṭaiyār tiruveḷḷiyaṅkuṉṟa muṭaiya nāyanār tevatāṉattut tiruṉuntāviḷak
kuppuṟattu tirutteṅkūr viyāpārikaḷ vilaikoṇṭu Ivvūr kāvaṟkāṇi Uṭaiya tirut teṅkūṟ poyaṉukku veṭṭaippeṟāka Innilam Oru māvukku
m Iṟṟai nāḷile viyāpārikaḷ taṅkaḷ kāṇiyile Ippaḷḷikkut talaimāṟāka nilamiṭu kaiyāl Ivarkaḷ muṉppu Iṉṉāyaṉār pāl vilai ko
ṇṭu viṭṭa nilam Orumāvum ritakā Ivarkaḷ l Iṉ ṉilaṅ koṇṭa kācu [5 10]kkum paḻampaṭiye tirunāmattukkā
ṇiyākak kūṭṭikkoṇṭu Ivarkaḷ Iṟuttup potukiṟa Eṇṇaiyiṟaiyun tavittuk kuṭuttu kalveṭṭikkuṭuttom Ik
koyiṟ cikāriyañ ceyvārum śrīmāheśvarakkaṅkāṇi ceyvārum tevakaṉmi koyiṟ kaṇakkaṉum Ivvaṉaivom ..ippaṭikku Eḻuttiṭṭār
Akāraṇak kaṅkāṇi taṟpuruṣa tevareḻutteṉṟum Akāraṇam comaṉātateva re ḻutteṉṟum tevarkaṉmi Irā[ja*]rā[ja*]paṭṭaneḻutteṉṟum koyiṟkaṇakku
pputukkuṭaiyāṉeḻutteṉṟum Uyyavantān tukkaiyāṇṭār reḻutteṉṟum Iṭarkeṭa vantā reḻutteṉṟum Eḻuttiṭṭatu ..
Digital edition of SII 17.576 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
